key_sentences.pinyin: Wǒ juéde zhège xiǎngfǎ hěn hǎo.
key_sentences.english: I think this idea is very good.

key_sentences.chinese: 虽然很难，但是很有意思。
key_sentences.pinyin: Suīrán hěn nán, dànshì hěn yǒu yìsi.
key_sentences.english: Although it's difficult, it's very interesting.

key_sentences.pinyin: Yīnwèi xià yǔ, suǒyǐ wǒ méi qù.
key_sentences.english: Because it rained, I didn't go.

key_sentences.chinese: 我认为学中文比较重要。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wǒ rènwéi xué Zhōngwén bǐjiào zhòngyào.
key_sentences.english: I believe learning Chinese is relatively important.

grammar_point.title: Conjunctions: 虽然...但是 and 因为...所以
grammar_point.explanation: Two key paired conjunctions: 虽然 (suīrán) = although, always paired with 但是 (dànshì) = but. 因为 (yīnwèi) = because, always paired with 所以 (suǒyǐ) = therefore/so. Important: in Chinese, both parts of the pair are usually stated, unlike English where we drop one.

examples.chinese: 虽然我很忙，但是我来了
examples.pinyin: Suīrán wǒ hěn máng, dànshì wǒ lái le
examples.english: Although I'm very busy, I still came

examples.chinese: 因为天气好，所以我们去公园
examples.pinyin: Yīnwèi tiānqì hǎo, suǒyǐ wǒmen qù gōngyuán
examples.english: Because the weather is good, we're going to the park

quiz.question: What does 虽然…但是 express?
